title_en: Seasons, Etiquette, Formal Address, and Family
petrov_stage: Rework earlier material through polite address, etiquette, and family.
petrov_mission: Run a polite greeting or apology exchange, then add one family or frequency sentence.
focus_targets: Etiquette phrases are the true language core
Polite 您 replaces informal 你 in formal address
Family size uses 有 plus a classifier for people

listening_tasks.prompt: Listen for one of these lesson anchors and identify the intent: 春天, 夏天, 秋天, 冬天.
Listen to a line that uses Seasons are built with 天 and Etiquette phrases are the true language core and repeat the key detail correctly.

reading_tasks.prompt: Match these lesson items to their meanings: 春天, 夏天, 秋天, 冬天.
Rebuild one short sentence that uses Seasons are built with 天 with one lesson vocabulary item.

speaking_tasks.prompt: Run a polite greeting or apology exchange, then add one family or frequency sentence.
Repeat the four seasons in order.

rapid_recall: Recall and say: 春天, 夏天, 秋天, 冬天, 北 / 南 / 东 / 西.
mock_pass_criteria: Uses at least two of these lesson anchors correctly: 春天, 夏天, 秋天.
Produces one correct spoken line using Seasons are built with 天.
Answers one follow-up without dropping completely out of Chinese.
